'''danozo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:swagsman|swagsman]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-n-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:swagsman|swagsman]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| danozo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dænezeth|dænezeth]] || [[word:dænezej|dænezej]] || [[word:dænezesh|dænezesh]] || [[word:dæneze|dæneze]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:danonozoth|danonozoth]] || [[word:danonozoj|danonozoj]] || [[word:danonozosh|danonozosh]] || [[word:danonozo|danonozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:danozoth|danozoth]] || [[word:danozoj|danozoj]] || [[word:danozosh|danozosh]] || [[word:danozo|danozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:danofzoth|danofzoth]] || [[word:danofzoj|danofzoj]] || [[word:danofzosh|danofzosh]] || [[word:danofzof|danofzof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:danozotho|danozotho]] || [[word:danozojo|danozojo]] || [[word:danozosho|danozosho]] || [[word:danozoko|danozoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:danozoth|danozoth]] || [[word:danozoj|danozoj]] || [[word:danozosh|danozosh]] || [[word:danozo|danozo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:danozothol|danozothol]] || [[word:danozojol|danozojol]] || [[word:danozoshol|danozoshol]] || [[word:danozokol|danozokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:danozothotho|danozothotho]] || [[word:danozojojo|danozojojo]] || [[word:danozoshosho|danozoshosho]] || [[word:danozoko|danozoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:danozothon|danozothon]] || [[word:danozojon|danozojon]] || [[word:danozoshon|danozoshon]] || [[word:danozokon|danozokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:danozothoro|danozothoro]] || [[word:danozojoro|danozojoro]] || [[word:danozoshoro|danozoshoro]] || [[word:danozokoro|danozokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
